info.name: Cargo-Admin API
info.description:
Laravel public API collection generated from routes/api.php. Set collection variables before running requests.

**Guest / public browsing (no Bearer token):**
- `GET /v1/public/platforms` — platforms + sliders
- `GET /v1/public/platform-sliders` — homepage banners
- `GET /v1/public/taobao/products` — product listing
- `GET /v1/public/taobao/products/{id}` — product detail
- `GET /v1/public/1688/products` — same for 1688

Legacy paths without `/public` prefix still work (`/v1/taobao/products`, etc.).

**Authenticated routes** (`/v1/auth/*`) require `Authorization: Bearer {{customer_token}}`.

Checkout flow: select a Tajikistan warehouse on the user profile (`PATCH /v1/auth/profile` with `warehouse_id`), then call cart preview/checkout without `warehouse_id`, `address_id`, or package dimensions in the body. Checkout pays goods only.

Pickup flow (Tajikistan cargo shipping):
1. Warehouse staff measure package and confirm → order becomes `ready_for_pickup`
2. Mobile app reads `pickup` from order list/detail (`GET /v1/auth/taobao/orders` or `/v1/auth/1688/orders`)
3. Build customer QR from `pickup.qr.payload` (format: `cargo-pickup:{token}`)
4. Optional: `GET /v1/auth/orders/{order}/pickup` for wallet balance + `can_pay`
5. Pay cargo shipping: `POST /v1/auth/orders/{order}/pickup/pay` with `payment_method`: `wallet` or `online`

item.name: 00 - Public Guest (No Token)
item.description: Guest browsing endpoints. Do not send Authorization header. Prefer `/v1/public/*` paths in the mobile app.

request.description: Platforms with embedded sliders and commission slabs. No token required.
Homepage slider banners. Optional `platform_id` query filter.
Guest product listing. No Bearer token.
Guest product detail. No Bearer token.
Guest lessons listing. Returns only active items. Set collection `locale` (en, ru, tg) via Accept-Language header.
Guest news listing. Returns only active items. Set collection `locale` (en, ru, tg) via Accept-Language header.

request.description: Set the user's destination Tajikistan warehouse before checkout. Required for cart preview/checkout.
final_amount is per-unit TJS. Stored line total = final_amount × quantity. Response final_amount is the payable line total; final_amount_per_unit is the unit price.
final_amount is per-unit TJS. Line total stored as final_amount × quantity.

exec: pm.test('Orders list returns data array', function () {

request.description:
Lists customer Taobao orders with items, warehouse, shipping method, and pickup block when warehouse has confirmed measurements.

When `status` is `ready_for_pickup` (or `pickup_token` exists), each order includes:
```json
"pickup": {
  "payment_status": "pending",
  "shipping_fee_tjs": 300,
  "calculation_method": "weight",
  "package": { "length_cm": 10, "width_cm": 10, "height_cm": 10, "weight_kg": 25, "volume_m3": 0.001 },
  "qr": {
    "token": "uuid",
    "payload": "cargo-pickup:uuid"
  },
  "paid_at": null
}
```
Mobile app: encode `pickup.qr.payload` as QR for warehouse staff scanning.

query.description: Set to 1 to refresh status from Elim API before returning.

request.description: Single order with full item snapshots, warehouse, shipping method, `cargo_shipping_fee_tjs`, and `pickup` block (token + `cargo-pickup:{token}` payload) when ready for pickup. Use `pickup.qr.payload` to render the customer pickup QR in the mobile app.
final_amount is per-unit TJS. Stored line total = final_amount × quantity. Response final_amount is the payable line total; final_amount_per_unit is the unit price.
final_amount is per-unit TJS. Line total stored as final_amount × quantity.

exec: pm.test('Orders list returns data array', function () {

request.description:
Lists customer 1688 orders with items, warehouse, shipping method, and pickup block when warehouse has confirmed measurements.

When ready for pickup, each order includes `pickup.qr.token` and `pickup.qr.payload` (`cargo-pickup:{token}`) for mobile QR rendering.

query.description: Set to 1 to refresh status from Elim API before returning.

request.description: Single 1688 order with full item snapshots, warehouse, shipping method, `cargo_shipping_fee_tjs`, and `pickup` block (token + `cargo-pickup:{token}` payload) when ready for pickup.
Returns all active Tajikistan warehouses for profile selection. Omit address_id.

query.description: Optional. When provided, warehouses are sorted by distance from this saved address.

request.description: Legacy helper: nearest warehouses to a saved user address.
Goods payment preview at checkout (China goods only). Cargo shipping is **not** included here; use Pickup Preview after warehouse confirms measurements.

exec: pm.test('Pickup preview includes QR payload', function () {

request.description:
Available when order status is `ready_for_pickup`. Returns measured package details, cargo shipping fee, `qr.token`, `qr.payload` (`cargo-pickup:{token}`), wallet balance, `payment_methods` (`wallet` / `online`), and `can_pay`.

Mobile app: render QR from `data.qr.payload`.

Pay Tajikistan cargo shipping after warehouse staff confirm measurements. Body: `payment_method` = `wallet` (deducts TJS wallet balance) or `online` (records transaction without wallet deduction). Requires `pickup.payment_status` = `pending`.

query.description: Required for Taobao. Integer package ID from Elim order detail.
